title: Parkio Daily for May 9, 2026
teaser: Disney World invests $1.3M in Central Florida schools. Teacup Confessions brings celebrity interviews to the Mad Tea Party.

bignews.title: Disney World Invests $1.3M in Central Florida Schools
bignews.body: Ahead of Cool KIDS' SUMMER, Walt Disney World announced a $1.3 million investment supporting education programs across Orange, Osceola, Lake, Polk, and Seminole counties. The donation funds STEM initiatives, literacy programs, arts education, and nonprofits including Elevate Orlando and A Gift for Teaching. Disney also visited local elementary schools with Goofy and the Goof Troop, bringing Cool KIDS' SUMMER activities to kindergarten and pre-K students, and surprised teachers with complimentary theme park tickets.

topstories.title: Teacup Confessions: Celebrities Spin and Spill at Disney Parks
topstories.body: Disney Parks launched Teacup Confessions, a new celebrity interview series filmed on the Mad Tea Party attraction. Episodes feature Anna Cathcart, Maia Kealoha, Paris Hilton, Piper Curda and Bobby Moynihan, and the Mowry siblings discussing their latest projects and Disney hot takes while spinning in teacups. New episodes premiere every Tuesday on Disney Parks YouTube.

spotlight.title: Cool KIDS' SUMMER Returns May 26
spotlight.body: Get ready for GoofyCore at EPCOT and seriously silly fun across Walt Disney World. Cool KIDS' SUMMER runs from May 26 through September 8, featuring activities designed for young children and families. The celebration includes dance parties, character meet-and-greets, and interactive experiences perfect for kindergarten and pre-K guests.
